July 1, 2024 
Where to Find Vaccines 
Learn where to find vaccines in your community, including travel vaccines. 
July 10, 2024 
Your Vaccine Records 
Covers locating vaccine records, recording your vaccinations, and if you can't find your records. 
June 13, 2024 
How to Pay for Vaccines 
Information about paying for vaccines with private insurance, Medicare, Medicaid, military benefits... 
July 10, 2024 
Vaccines Adults Need 
Recommended Vaccines 
Information about routine vaccines for adults. 
June 12, 2024 
Staying Up to Date with COVID-19 Vaccines 
People who are up to date with their COVID-19 vaccine have lower risk of severe illness. 
Preventing Seasonal Flu 
Strategies to reduce the risk of seasonal flu. 
Tetanus Vaccination 
Tetanus vaccination is recommended for people of all ages. 
Diphtheria Vaccination 
People of all ages should get vaccinated against diphtheria. 
Whooping Cough Vaccination 
CDC recommends whooping cough vaccination for people of all ages. 
Vaccine Resources 
View, download, or print communication resources to learn about vaccination and specific vaccines.

The Standards for Adult Immunization 
Aug. 9, 2024 
Strategies for Increasing Adult Vaccination Rates 
Improving adult vaccination rates and reducing the number of missed opportunities
